profile.title: Senior Android Developer
profile.about_me: ..Experienced Senior Android Developer with a strong background in building and maintaining native Android applications, Android TV apps, and mobile games. Skilled in Kotlin, Java, Jetpack Compose, and modern Android frameworks. Passionate about crafting high quality, maintainable, and user centered applications ranging from healthcare solutions to fitness platforms and gaming experiences.

featured_projects.name: Little Ones
featured_projects.overview: Little Ones is a baby sleep and parenting app that provides expert routines, sleep tracking, and personalized advice. It includes a community feed where parents and consultants can post updates and a private chat system for one on one communication.
features: Community feed with posts, comments, and social interactions
Private messaging system between parents and consultants
Sleep tracking and personalized parenting advice
key_contributions: Rebuilt major app components using Jetpack Compose and modular architecture
Developed a social feed supporting posts, comments, and media uploads with real time updates
Implemented private chat and messaging using Firebase Firestore, Realtime Database, and Firebase Authentication
Integrated Firebase Cloud Messaging for notifications and engagement
Collaborated with product and UX teams to align with Material Design 3

featured_projects.name: F45 Training
featured_projects.overview: An Android TV application for F45 studios that acts as a virtual workout coach displaying exercise sessions and real time performance metrics.
key_contributions: Built Android TV applications for large studio workout displays
Integrated Bluetooth heart rate monitors for live tracking and visualization
Implemented real time workout synchronization and session displays
Optimized playback and rendering for high resolution video
Ensured reliable multi screen synchronization across studio environments

featured_projects.name: Perfect Home Health
featured_projects.overview: A healthcare management app used by home health professionals for scheduling, documentation, and compliance tracking.
key_contributions: Built modules for patient data entry, scheduling, and synchronization
Ensured HIPAA compliance and reliability for field operations

featured_projects.name: Eagle Quote
featured_projects.overview: A quoting and CRM tool for insurance agents to generate and manage client quotes efficiently.
key_contributions: Developed MVVM based modules for scalable architecture
Integrated RESTful APIs for quote generation and management
Improved testing and deployment workflows with CI/CD pipelines

featured_projects.name: Tilt Toby
featured_projects.overview: A tilt based physics mobile game featuring smooth motion controls and engaging gameplay mechanics.
key_contributions: Designed and built the game using Corona SDK (Solar2D) and Lua
Implemented responsive tilt controls and optimized physics rendering
Directed a small team and managed the full development and QA cycle

responsibilities: Built and maintained frontend gaming and chat applications using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose
Leveraged Ktor for networking and API communication
Implemented deployment pipelines using GitLab CI/CD
Utilized Fastlane for build and release automation
Collaborated with backend and design teams to deliver responsive user experiences
Developed and maintained Android applications using Kotlin, Java, and XML
Modernized legacy applications with Jetpack Compose
Integrated Firebase for analytics, authentication, and synchronization
Refactored codebases for performance, scalability, and maintainability
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions
Mentored developers and promoted clean architecture practices
Developed Android applications using Java, Android SDK, and XML layouts
Implemented Bluetooth integration for heart rate monitor connectivity
Integrated RESTful APIs, SQLite, and JSON
Applied Material Design standards for usability improvements
Mentored junior developers on debugging and coding standards
Conducted performance tuning and unit testing
Developed healthcare and hospice management applications
Supported patient documentation and home visit workflows
Focused on offline functionality and synchronization
Collaborated with QA and product teams for healthcare compliance
Developed enterprise and healthcare Android applications
Integrated APIs using Retrofit and Gson
Maintained compatibility with newer Android SDK releases
Focused on data integrity and application security
Led mobile app and game development projects
Designed and developed Android games using Corona SDK
Defined workflows, coding standards, and version control practices
Managed a small development team

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
